description: Full-width hero section at the top of pages featuring a large background image or video with overlaid text content, heading, and call-to-action.

layout.structure: Full-width, single column with overlay content
layout.alignment: Center or left-aligned text over full-bleed image

FR-01.title: Full-Width Background Media
FR-01.description: The hero block MUST render a full-viewport-width background media element (image or video) that spans edge-to-edge with no horizontal margins.
acceptance: Background image fills 100% viewport width
Image scales proportionally (object-fit: cover)
Image maintains minimum height of 416px on desktop
Image source served from DAM (Scene7 or equivalent CDN)

FR-02.title: Heading Display
FR-02.description: The hero MUST display a primary heading (H1) overlaid on the background media.
acceptance: H1 rendered in F37 Lineca Medium, weight 800
Desktop: 64px / 68px line-height
Tablet: 40px / 44px line-height
Mobile: 30px / 34px line-height
Text color: white (#FFFFFF) on dark/image backgrounds, navy (#071D49) on light backgrounds

FR-03.title: Subtitle/Description
FR-03.description: The hero SHOULD display an optional subtitle or description paragraph below the heading.
acceptance: Rendered in Roboto Regular, 18px at desktop, 16px at mobile
Maximum content width constrained within the hero overlay
Color matches heading color scheme

FR-04.title: Call-to-Action
FR-04.description: The hero SHOULD include an optional CTA link or button.
acceptance: CTA rendered as uppercase text link or button
Font: Roboto Bold, 14px, uppercase
Color: #0066F5 (blue) on light backgrounds, #FFFFFF on dark backgrounds
Links to internal page or anchor (#section01)

FR-05.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-05.description: The hero layout MUST adapt across breakpoints.
acceptance: Desktop (1440px): Full-width image with text overlay positioned over image
Tablet (768px): Image displayed, text may move below image
Mobile (375px): Image stacked above text, reduced font sizes
Height adjusts based on content and variant

FR-06.title: Pause/Play Control (Video Variant)
FR-06.description: When the hero contains a video background, a pause/play toggle button MUST be provided.
acceptance: Button visually accessible in hero area
Toggles video playback on click
Accessible label: 'Pause/Play button'

A.description: Standard hero with a full-width background image and white text overlaid directly on the image with a dark overlay or positioned on a darker region of the image.

additionalRequirements.FR-A01: Background image MUST have sufficient contrast with white text. A semi-transparent dark overlay or strategic image composition ensures readability.
additionalRequirements.FR-A02: Text content positioned in the lower-left or center of the hero area.

B.description: Hero with a full-width background image and a white card that overlaps the bottom of the hero, creating a layered visual effect using the overlap-predecessor pattern.

additionalRequirements.FR-B01: White card MUST visually overlap the hero image by 40-80px using negative margin or overlap-predecessor class.

C.description: Hero with an auto-playing background video (muted) with text overlay and a pause/play toggle button.

additionalRequirements.FR-C01: Video MUST auto-play on page load, muted, and loop continuously.
additionalRequirements.FR-C02: A Pause/Play button MUST be visible and accessible.
additionalRequirements.FR-C03: On mobile/low-bandwidth, a fallback poster image SHOULD display instead of video.
additionalRequirements.FR-C04: Video MUST NOT auto-play if user has prefers-reduced-motion enabled.

D.description: Hero with a solid navy or gradient purple background color instead of an image, used for legal/static pages and bio pages.

additionalRequirements.FR-D01: Background MUST be a solid brand color (#071D49 navy) or a CSS gradient.
additionalRequirements.FR-D03: Shorter height than image-based heroes (height-short variant).

E.description: Similar to Variant A but the CTA is an in-page anchor link that scrolls to the next section rather than navigating away.

additionalRequirements.FR-E01: CTA link MUST smooth-scroll to the target anchor section.
additionalRequirements.FR-E02: Anchor target section MUST have a corresponding ID attribute.

accessibility.AC-01: H1 MUST be the first heading in the document reading order
accessibility.AC-02: Background images MUST have appropriate alt text
accessibility.AC-03: Text MUST meet WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratio (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)
accessibility.AC-04: Video pause/play button MUST be keyboard accessible
accessibility.AC-05: Skip-to-content link MUST bypass the hero to reach main content
